creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Consistency, accuracy. 

Where <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#x-graphic-card-drivers> uses the word Virtualbox, it should be: 

VirtualBox

Reference: <https://docs.oracle.com/en/virtualization/virtualbox/index.html>

----

% rg --count --sort path Virtualbox /usr/doc
/usr/doc/documentation/content/de/books/handbook/virtualization/_index.adoc:1
/usr/doc/documentation/content/en/books/handbook/x11/_index.adoc:2
/usr/doc/documentation/content/en/books/handbook/x11/_index.po:2
/usr/doc/website/content/en/status/report-2009-01-2009-03.html:2
/usr/doc/website/content/en/status/report-2010-10-2010-12.html:1
%
